name: VaultConfig
description: Live vault configuration — singleton document controlling the 8-dimension parameter space, vocabulary mapping, pipeline settings, and maintenance thresholds.

global.schema:
type DimensionPosition {
    value: Int!
    confidence: Float!
    rationale: String
}

type DimensionConfig {
    granularity: DimensionPosition!
    organization: DimensionPosition!
    linking: DimensionPosition!
    processing: DimensionPosition!
    navigation: DimensionPosition!
    maintenance: DimensionPosition!
    schema: DimensionPosition!
    automation: DimensionPosition!
}

type VocabularyMap {
    notes: String!
    inbox: String!
    reduce: String!
    reflect: String!
    reweave: String!
    verify: String!
    rethink: String!
    topicMap: String!
    description: String!
}

type PipelineConfig {
    depth: String!
    autoChain: Boolean!
    extractionSelectivity: Float!
}

type MaintenanceConfig {
    orphanThreshold: Int!
    danglingThreshold: Int!
    inboxPressure: Int!
    observationAccumulation: Int!
    tensionAccumulation: Int!
    mocOversize: Int!
    staleNoteDays: Int!
}

type ExtractionCategory {
    id: OID!
    name: String!
    description: String!
    active: Boolean!
}

type NoteSchemaConfig {
    requiredFields: [String!]!
    optionalFields: [String!]!
    kindValues: [String!]!
    confidenceValues: [String!]!
}

type MocSchemaConfig {
    requiredFields: [String!]!
    tierValues: [String!]!
}

type VaultConfigState {
    name: String
    domain: String
    dimensions: DimensionConfig
    vocabulary: VocabularyMap
    features: [String!]!
    pipeline: PipelineConfig
    maintenance: MaintenanceConfig
    extractionCategories: [ExtractionCategory!]!
    noteSchema: NoteSchemaConfig
    mocSchema: MocSchemaConfig
    updatedAt: DateTime
}
global.initialValue:
{
    "name": null,
    "domain": null,
    "dimensions": null,
    "vocabulary": null,
    "features": [],
    "pipeline": null,
    "maintenance": null,
    "extractionCategories": [],
    "noteSchema": null,
    "mocSchema": null,
    "updatedAt": null
}

operations.name: INITIALIZE_CONFIG
operations.description: Initialize vault configuration with name and domain
operations.template: Initialize vault configuration with name and domain

operations.name: UPDATE_DIMENSION
operations.schema:
input UpdateDimensionInput {
    dimension: String!
    value: Int!
    confidence: Float!
    rationale: String
    updatedAt: DateTime!
}

operations.name: UPDATE_VOCABULARY
UPDATE_PIPELINE_CONFIG
UPDATE_MAINTENANCE_THRESHOLD
ADD_EXTRACTION_CATEGORY
TOGGLE_EXTRACTION_CATEGORY
operations.reducer:
const cat = state.extractionCategories.find(c => c.id === action.input.id);
if (cat) cat.active = action.input.active;

operations.name: TOGGLE_FEATURE
